_comment: Single-document factual lookup. The model should retrieve the right
chunk and answer from it. Replace expected_chunk_ids with real IDs
from your knowledge base — see README 'How to add gold'.
expected_keywords is a cheap fallback: pass [] or omit if you have
chunk_ids filled in; the eval will use the more precise chunk metrics.
query: What does the document say about the [main topic]?
